news.title: Rupee hits five-week high, ends at 94.71 vs USD on easing Mideast tensions
news.description: The rupee rose 40 paise to close at 94.71 against the US dollar, hitting a five-week high as easing geopolitical tensions in West Asia boosted market sentiment. news.title: Vodafone Idea among 4 midcap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 16% in a month
news.description: Amid a strong market rally that lifted the Sensex by 736 points, four BSE MidCap stocks—Vodafone Idea, Bank of Maharashtra, Federal Bank and Nippon Life India AMC—scaled fresh 52-week highs. The milestone reflects strong investor confidence and sustained momentum in these counters.

news.title: Former airport to reopen ahead of NATO meeting
news.description: A new airport in the Turkish capital Ankara is set to be inaugurated on June 15 with the participation of Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, as the new hub is highly anticipated to significantly alleviate the air traffic burden of the upcoming NATO summit in July.
